pi_items.source: Task description clearly specifies this exact file path.
Task description strictly instructs naming it exported_fells_loop with GPX extension.
Original fells_loop.gpx is approximately 29.8 KB, well over the 500 bytes minimum.
Original fells_loop.gpx contains 132 waypoints (<wpt>), satisfying the 10 data points minimum.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GPS data ('Fells Loop') sourced from TopoGrafix. The required output path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\exported_fells_loop.gpx' and filename 'exported_fells_loop.gpx' are explicitly detailed in the task description. The original data file contains 132 waypoints and is ~29.8 KB, significantly exceeding the minimum 10 data points and 500 bytes thresholds respectively.
